evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Implement data quality practices; Troubleshoot existing systems; Optimize for transformations
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour: data quality implementation and optimization emphasis; no velocity language present.
evidence.domain_risk: iGaming/gaming analytics; financial metrics (GGR, wagering, deposits); fraud/AML patterns
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: High: iGaming sector with financial/payment processing context and fraud risk management signals high domain risk.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Design, build, and maintain scalable data pipelines; curated datasets; partner with analysts
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Mid: named tools (Databricks, Spark) in responsibilities, multiple pipeline types suggest growing function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Design, build, and maintain scalable data pipelines and curated datasets; Create ETL/ELT pipelines in Azure Databricks; Implement data quality practices
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Hiring manager: specific technical ownership (pipeline design, ETL creation, quality implementation) shows domain expertise.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Partner with analysts to deliver reporting-ready datasets; support analytics across organization
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Internal data: role focuses on data pipeline infrastructure supporting analytics consumers.
evidence.autonomy_level: Design; build; maintain; partner with analysts; troubleshoot
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Execution: candidate owns pipeline infrastructure within analyst partnership framework.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools or expected AI capability.
evidence.testing_framing: Implement data quality practices; workflow orchestration experience (Airflow, Dagster)
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Tool listed: data quality and orchestration tools mentioned in requirements but not as owned responsibility.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Implement data quality practices; Troubleshoot existing systems; Problem-solving orientation with ownership mindset
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate: data quality and pipeline reliability concern secondary to delivery and analytics support.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Design, build, and maintain scalable data pipelines; Partner with analysts to deliver reporting-ready datasets
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Fix/scale: building and improving analytics infrastructure, not starting from zero.
evidence.loss_aversion: Implement data quality practices; Troubleshoot existing systems.
